avatarScaling.title: Kukulitsa/Kuchepetsa Avatar
avatarScaling.subtitle: Njira yeniyeni ya VRChat yosinthira kutalika kudzera mu OSC — imagwira ntchito pa avatar iliyonse
avatarScaling.saveWorlds: Sungani kukula pakati pa dziko ndi dziko
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Njira zofulumizitsa zimagwira ntchito ponseponse (ngakhale VRChat ili pa fokasi). Ngati kiyi sichitha kujambulidwa, mukhoza kugwiritsabe ntchito silaida pamwambapa.
translator.title: Womasulira
translator.aiGrammarFix: Konzani grammar ndi AI choyamba (imagwiritsa ntchito wopereka utumiki wa IntelliChat pamwambapa)
translator.note: Imagwiritsidwa ntchito ndi njira yomasulira ya Live Typing chatbox ndiponso kulikonse mu app komwe kumapezeka njira yakuti "Masulirani musanatumize."
liveTyping.title: Live Typing
liveTyping.subtitle: imatumiza pamene mukulemba, monga chatbox yeniyeni ya VRChat
liveTyping.placeholder: Lembani pano — izi zimatumizidwa kwa chatbox mwaokha pakangopita masekondi angapo pamene mukulemba. Pitirizani kulemba kupitirira zilembo 144; VRChat idzawonetsa '…' + mapeto a uthenga wanu.
liveTyping.translateLabel: Masulirani musanatumize (imagwiritsa ntchito zoikapo za Womasulira)
languagePicker.title: Sankhani chinenero chanu
languagePicker.subtitle: Mukhoza kusintha izi pambuyo pake mu Zoikapo.
settingsLanguage.title: Chinenero
settingsLanguage.label: Chinenero cha App
